clause_title: OBJECTIVES AND CONFORMANCE
requirement_text: To conform to this European Standard it shall be shown that each of the requirements have been satisfied to the software safety integrity level defined and therefore the clause objective has been met.
action: To conform to this European Standard it shall be shown that each of the requirements have been satisfied to the software safety integrity level defined and therefore the clause objective has been met.

clause_title: Where a requirement is qualiﬁed by the words
requirement_text: Where 4.3 applies the tables detailed in this Eu- ropean Standard should be used to assist in the selection of techniques and measures appropri- ate to the software safety integrity level.
condition: Where 4.3 applies the tables detailed in this Eu- ropean Standard
action: should be used to assist in the selection of techniques and measures appropri- ate to the software safety integrity level.

clause_title: Where a requirement is qualiﬁed by the words
requirement_text: If a technique or measure is ranked as highly recommended (HR) in the tables then the ra- tionale for not using that technique should be detailed and recorded either in the Software Quality Assurance Plan or in another document referenced by the Software Quality Assurance Plan.
condition: If a technique or measure is ranked as highly recommended (HR) in the tables then the ra- tionale for not using that technique
action: should be detailed and recorded either in the Software Quality Assurance Plan or in another document referenced by the Software Quality Assurance Plan.

clause_title: Where a requirement is qualiﬁed by the words
requirement_text: If a technique or measure is proposed to be used that is not contained in the tables then its effectiveness and suitability in meeting the par- ticular requirement and overall objective of the clause shall be justified and recorded in either the Software Quality Assurance Plan or in an- other document referenced by the Software Quality Assurance Plan.
condition: If a technique or measure is proposed to be used that is not contained in the tables then its effectiveness and suitability in meeting the par- ticular requirement and overall objective of the clause
action: shall be justified and recorded in either the Software Quality Assurance Plan or in an- other document referenced by the Software Quality Assurance Plan.

clause_title: Where a requirement is qualiﬁed by the words
requirement_text: Compliance with the requirements of a particu- lar clause and their respective techniques and measures detailed in the tables shall be as- sessed by the inspection of documents required by this standard, other objective evidence, au- diting and the witnessing of tests.
action: Compliance with the requirements of a particu- lar clause and their respective techniques and measures detailed in the tables shall be as- sessed by the inspection of documents required by this standard, other objective evidence, au- diting and the witnessing of tests.

clause_title: Objective
requirement_text: The software safety integrity level shall be spec- ified through following the general process for obtaining a safety integrity level identified in EN 50126.
action: The software safety integrity level shall be spec- ified through following the general process for obtaining a safety integrity level identified in EN 50126.

clause_title: Objective
requirement_text: The required software safety integrity level shall be decided on the basis of the level of risk asso- ciated with the use of the software in the sys- tem and the system safety integrity level.
action: The required software safety integrity level shall be decided on the basis of the level of risk asso- ciated with the use of the software in the sys- tem and the system safety integrity level.

clause_title: Without further precautions, the software safety
requirement_text: integrity level shall be, as a minimum, identical to the system safety integrity level.
action: integrity level shall be, as a minimum, identical to the system safety integrity level.

clause_title: Risk may be quantiﬁed but it is not possible to
requirement_text: Therefore for this European Standard the software safety integrity shall be specified as one of the following five levels: Il rischio può essere quantificato, ma non è possibi- le specificare l’integrità della sicurezza del software allo stesso modo.
action: Therefore for this European Standard the software safety integrity shall be specified as one of the following five levels: Il rischio può essere quantificato, ma non è possibi- le specificare l’integrità della sicurezza del software allo stesso modo.

clause_title: The software safety integrity level shall be spec-
requirement_text: If different software components have different software safety integrity levels, these shall be specified in the Software Archi- tecture Specification (clause 9).
condition: If different software components have different software safety integrity levels
action: these shall be specified in the Software Archi- tecture Specification (clause 9).

clause_title: The software safety integrity level shall be spec-
requirement_text: Requirements Requisiti As a minimum, the supplier and/or developer and the customer shall implement the relevant parts of EN ISO 9001, in accordance with the guidelines contained in EN ISO 9000-3.
action: Requirements Requisiti As a minimum, the supplier and/or developer and the customer shall implement the relevant parts of EN ISO 9001, in accordance with the guidelines contained in EN ISO 9000-3.

clause_title: The software safety integrity level shall be spec-
requirement_text: Except at software safety integrity level zero, the safety process shall be implemented under the control of an appropriate safety organisation which is compliant with the “Safety Organisa- tion” sub-clause in the “Evidence of Safety Man- agement” clause of EN 50129.
action: Except at software safety integrity level zero, the safety process shall be implemented under the control of an appropriate safety organisation which is compliant with the “Safety Organisa- tion” sub-clause in the “Evidence of Safety Man- agement” clause of EN 50129.

clause_title: The software safety integrity level shall be spec-
requirement_text: All personnel involved in all the phases of the Software Lifecycle, including management activ- ities, shall have the appropriate training, experi- ence and qualifications.
action: All personnel involved in all the phases of the Software Lifecycle, including management activ- ities, shall have the appropriate training, experi- ence and qualifications.

clause_title: The software safety integrity level shall be spec-
requirement_text: The justification contained in 6.2.4 shall be re- corded in the Software Quality Assurance Plan, and shall include evidence of competency in the following areas, as appropriate: i) engineering appropriate to the application area; software engineering; ii) iii) computer-systems engineering; iv) safety engineering; v) legal and regulatory framework.
action: The justification contained in 6.2.4 shall be re- corded in the Software Quality Assurance Plan, and shall include evidence of competency in the following areas, as appropriate: i) engineering appropriate to the application area; software engineering; ii) iii) computer-systems engineering; iv) safety engineering; v) legal and regulatory framework.

clause_title: The software safety integrity level shall be spec-
requirement_text: An independent assessor for the software shall be appointed.
action: An independent assessor for the software shall be appointed.

clause_title: The software safety integrity level shall be spec-
requirement_text: The assessor shall be given authority to perform the assessment of the software.
action: The assessor shall be given authority to perform the assessment of the software.

clause_title: Throughout the Software Lifecycle, the parties
requirement_text: involved shall be independent, to the extent re- quired by the software safety integrity level, in accordance with Figure 5, which shall be inter- preted as follows.
action: involved shall be independent, to the extent re- quired by the software safety integrity level, in accordance with Figure 5, which shall be inter- preted as follows.

clause_title: Throughout the Software Lifecycle, the parties
requirement_text: At all software safety integrity levels, the Asses- sor shall be approved by the Safety Authority and independent from the supplier except in the circumstances defined in 6.2.10.
action: At all software safety integrity levels, the Asses- sor shall be approved by the Safety Authority and independent from the supplier except in the circumstances defined in 6.2.10.

clause_title: Throughout the Software Lifecycle, the parties
requirement_text: The Designer/Implementer, Verifier and Valida- tor can all belong to the same company but the following rules for minimum independence shall be complied with: At software safety integrity level 0: There are no constraints; the Designer/Imple- menter, Verifier and Validator can all be the same person.
action: The Designer/Implementer, Verifier and Valida- tor can all belong to the same company but the following rules for minimum independence shall be complied with: At software safety integrity level 0: There are no constraints; the Designer/Imple- menter, Verifier and Validator can all be the same person.

clause_title: Throughout the Software Lifecycle, the parties
requirement_text: Per il livello 1 e 2 di integrità della sicurezza del sof- tware: The Verifier and Validator can be the same person but they shall not be the Designer/Im- plementer.
action: Per il livello 1 e 2 di integrità della sicurezza del sof- tware: The Verifier and Validator can be the same person but they shall not be the Designer/Im- plementer.

clause_title: Throughout the Software Lifecycle, the parties
requirement_text: At software safety integrity level 3 & 4 there are two permissible arrangements: a) The Verifier and Validator can be the same person but they shall not also be the Design- er/Implementer.
action: At software safety integrity level 3 & 4 there are two permissible arrangements: a) The Verifier and Validator can be the same person but they shall not also be the Design- er/Implementer.

clause_title: Throughout the Software Lifecycle, the parties
requirement_text: In addition, the Verifier and Validator shall not all report through the Project Manager as the Designer/Implementer does and they shall have the authority to pre- vent the release of the product.
action: In addition, the Verifier and Validator shall not all report through the Project Manager as the Designer/Implementer does and they shall have the authority to pre- vent the release of the product.

clause_title: Throughout the Software Lifecycle, the parties
requirement_text: b) The Designer/Implementer, Verifier and Validator must all be separate persons.
action: b) The Designer/Implementer, Verifier and Validator must all be separate persons.

clause_title: Throughout the Software Lifecycle, the parties
requirement_text: The Designer/Implementer and Verifier can re- port through the Project Manager, whereas the Validator shall not and the Validator shall have the authority to prevent the re- lease of the product.
action: The Designer/Implementer and Verifier can re- port through the Project Manager, whereas the Validator shall not and the Validator shall have the authority to prevent the re- lease of the product.

clause_title: At the discretion of the Safety Authority, the As-
requirement_text: sessor may be part of the supplier’s organisation or of the customer’s organisation but, in such cases, the Assessor shall A discrezione dell’Autorità per la Sicurezza, il Va- lutatore può far parte dell’organizzazione del for- nitore, o dell’organizzazione del cliente, ma in tale caso, il Valutatore deve be authorised by the Safety Authority; be totally independent from the project team; report directly to the Safety Authority.
action: sessor may be part of the supplier’s organisation or of the customer’s organisation but, in such cases, the Assessor shall A discrezione dell’Autorità per la Sicurezza, il Va- lutatore può far parte dell’organizzazione del for- nitore, o dell’organizzazione del cliente, ma in tale caso, il Valutatore deve be authorised by the Safety Authority; be totally independent from the project team; report directly to the Safety Authority.

clause_title: Objectives
requirement_text: Requirements Requisiti A lifecycle model for the development of soft- ware shall be selected.
action: Requirements Requisiti A lifecycle model for the development of soft- ware shall be selected.

clause_title: Objectives
requirement_text: It shall be detailed in the Software Quality Assurance Plan in accordance with clause 15 of this European Standard.
action: It shall be detailed in the Software Quality Assurance Plan in accordance with clause 15 of this European Standard.

clause_title: Objectives
requirement_text: Quality Assurance procedures shall run in paral- lel with lifecycle activities and use the same ter- minology.
action: Quality Assurance procedures shall run in paral- lel with lifecycle activities and use the same ter- minology.

clause_title: Objectives
requirement_text: All activities to be performed during a phase shall be defined prior to the phase commencing.
action: All activities to be performed during a phase shall be defined prior to the phase commencing.

clause_title: Objectives
requirement_text: Each phase of the software lifecycle shall be di- vided into elementary tasks with a well defined input, output and activity for each of them.
action: Each phase of the software lifecycle shall be di- vided into elementary tasks with a well defined input, output and activity for each of them.

clause_title: Objectives
requirement_text: The Software Quality Assurance Plan shall de- scribe which verification steps and reports are required.
action: The Software Quality Assurance Plan shall de- scribe which verification steps and reports are required.

clause_title: Objectives
requirement_text: All documents shall be structured to allow contin- ued expansion in parallel with the design process.
action: All documents shall be structured to allow contin- ued expansion in parallel with the design process.

clause_title: Objectives
requirement_text: Traceability of documents shall be provided for by each document having a unique reference number and a defined and documented rela- tionship with other documents.
action: Traceability of documents shall be provided for by each document having a unique reference number and a defined and documented rela- tionship with other documents.

clause_title: Objectives
requirement_text: Each term, ac- ronym or abbreviation shall have the same meaning in every document.
action: Each term, ac- ronym or abbreviation shall have the same meaning in every document.

clause_title: Objectives
requirement_text: If, for historical reasons, this is not possible, the different mean- ings shall be listed and the references given.
action: If, for historical reasons, this is not possible, the different mean- ings shall be listed and the references given.

clause_title: c) each term, acronym or abbreviation shall
requirement_text: have the same meaning in every document; d) each item or concept shall be referred to by the same name or description in every doc- ument.
action: have the same meaning in every document; d) each item or concept shall be referred to by the same name or description in every doc- ument.

clause_title: c) each term, acronym or abbreviation shall
requirement_text: The contents of all documents shall be recorded for manipulation, in a processing and storage.
action: The contents of all documents shall be recorded for manipulation, in a processing and storage.

clause_title: c) each term, acronym or abbreviation shall
requirement_text: To the extent required by the software safety in- tegrity level, the documents listed in the Docu- ments Cross Reference Table (see below) shall be produced.
action: To the extent required by the software safety in- tegrity level, the documents listed in the Docu- ments Cross Reference Table (see below) shall be produced.

clause_title: c) each term, acronym or abbreviation shall
requirement_text: Documents which have been produced by in- dependent teams or entities shall not be com- bined into a single document.
action: Documents which have been produced by in- dependent teams or entities shall not be com- bined into a single document.

clause_title: c) each term, acronym or abbreviation shall
requirement_text: Where a clause is given, the following clauses should also be checked as they may contain fur- ther information.
action: the following clauses should also be checked as they may contain fur- ther information.

clause_title: c) each term, acronym or abbreviation shall
requirement_text: It should be noted that the ref- erence for the Software Configuration Manage- ment Plan is shown in brackets because that clause simply references EN ISO 9001.
action: It should be noted that the ref- erence for the Software Configuration Manage- ment Plan is shown in brackets because that clause simply references EN ISO 9001.

clause_title: Requirements
requirement_text: Requisiti The Software Requirements Specification shall express the required properties of the software being developed, not the procedures to devel- op them.
action: Requisiti The Software Requirements Specification shall express the required properties of the software being developed, not the procedures to devel- op them.

clause_title: Requirements
requirement_text: These properties, which are all (ex- cept safety) defined in ISO/IEC 9126, shall in- clude: La Specifica dei Requisiti del Software deve esprime- re le proprietà richieste al software che deve essere sviluppato, non le procedure per svilupparlo.
action: These properties, which are all (ex- cept safety) defined in ISO/IEC 9126, shall in- clude: La Specifica dei Requisiti del Software deve esprime- re le proprietà richieste al software che deve essere sviluppato, non le procedure per svilupparlo.

clause_title: Requirements
requirement_text: The software safety integrity level shall be de- rived as defined in clause 5 and recorded in the Software Requirements Specification.
action: The software safety integrity level shall be de- rived as defined in clause 5 and recorded in the Software Requirements Specification.

clause_title: To the extent required by the software safety in-
requirement_text: tegrity level the Software Requirements Specifi- cation shall be expressed and structured in such a way that it is i) complete, clear precise, unequivocal, verifi- able, testable, maintainable and feasible, ii) traceable back to all documents mentioned under 8.2.
action: tegrity level the Software Requirements Specifi- cation shall be expressed and structured in such a way that it is i) complete, clear precise, unequivocal, verifi- able, testable, maintainable and feasible, ii) traceable back to all documents mentioned under 8.2.

clause_title: The Software Requirements Speciﬁcation shall
requirement_text: The Software Requirements Specification shall identify and document all interfaces with any other systems, either within or outside the equipment under control, including operators, wherever a direct connection exists or is planned.
action: The Software Requirements Specification shall identify and document all interfaces with any other systems, either within or outside the equipment under control, including operators, wherever a direct connection exists or is planned.

clause_title: The Software Requirements Speciﬁcation shall
requirement_text: All relevant modes of operation shall be de- tailed in the Software Requirements Specifica- tion.
action: All relevant modes of operation shall be de- tailed in the Software Requirements Specifica- tion.

clause_title: The Software Requirements Speciﬁcation shall
requirement_text: All relevant modes of behaviour of the pro- grammable electronics, in particular failure be- haviour, shall be detailed in the Software Re- quirements Specification.
action: All relevant modes of behaviour of the pro- grammable electronics, in particular failure be- haviour, shall be detailed in the Software Re- quirements Specification.

clause_title: The Software Requirements Speciﬁcation shall
requirement_text: Any constraints between the hardware and the software shall be identified and documented in the Software Requirements Specification.
action: Any constraints between the hardware and the software shall be identified and documented in the Software Requirements Specification.

clause_title: The Software Requirements Speciﬁcation shall
requirement_text: The Software Requirements Specification shall indicate the degree of software self-checking and the specified degree of hardware checking by the software.
action: The Software Requirements Specification shall indicate the degree of software self-checking and the specified degree of hardware checking by the software.

clause_title: The Software Requirements Speciﬁcation shall
requirement_text: The Software Requirements Specification shall include requirements for the periodic testing of functions to the extent required by the System Safety Requirements Specification.
action: The Software Requirements Specification shall include requirements for the periodic testing of functions to the extent required by the System Safety Requirements Specification.

clause_title: The Software Requirements Speciﬁcation shall
requirement_text: The Software Requirements Specification shall include requirements to enable all safety func- tions to be testable during overall system opera- tion to the extent required by the System Safety Requirements Specification.
action: The Software Requirements Specification shall include requirements to enable all safety func- tions to be testable during overall system opera- tion to the extent required by the System Safety Requirements Specification.

clause_title: The Software Requirements Speciﬁcation shall
requirement_text: When the software is required to perform func- tions especially those related to achieving the required system safety integrity level, then these shall be clearly identified in the Software Re- quirements Specification.
condition: When the software is required to perform func- tions especially those related to achieving the required system safety integrity level
action: then these shall be clearly identified in the Software Re- quirements Specification.

clause_title: The Software Requirements Speciﬁcation shall
requirement_text: When the software is required to perform non-safety functions then these shall be clearly identified in the Software Requirements Specifi- cation.
condition: When the software is required to perform non-safety functions then these
action: shall be clearly identified in the Software Requirements Specifi- cation.

clause_title: The Software Requirements Speciﬁcation shall
requirement_text: A Software Requirements Test Specification shall be developed from the Software Requirements Specification.
action: A Software Requirements Test Specification shall be developed from the Software Requirements Specification.

clause_title: The Software Requirements Speciﬁcation shall
requirement_text: This test specification shall be used for verification of all the requirements as de- scribed in the Software Requirements Specifica- Una Specifica di Prova dei Requisiti del Software deve essere sviluppata dalla Specifica dei Requisi- ti del Software.
action: This test specification shall be used for verification of all the requirements as de- scribed in the Software Requirements Specifica- Una Specifica di Prova dei Requisiti del Software deve essere sviluppata dalla Specifica dei Requisi- ti del Software.

clause_title: SW MODULE DESIGN
requirement_text: Requisiti The proposed software architecture shall be es- tablished by the software supplier and/or devel- oper and detailed in the Software Architecture Specification.
action: Requisiti The proposed software architecture shall be es- tablished by the software supplier and/or devel- oper and detailed in the Software Architecture Specification.

clause_title: The Software Architecture Speciﬁcation shall
requirement_text: The Software Architecture Specification shall iden- tify, evaluate and detail the significance of all hardware/software interactions.
action: The Software Architecture Specification shall iden- tify, evaluate and detail the significance of all hardware/software interactions.

clause_title: The Software Architecture Speciﬁcation shall
requirement_text: As required by EN 50126 and EN 50129, the preliminary studies concerning the interactions between hardware and software shall have been recorded in the Sys- tem Safety Requirements Specification.
action: As required by EN 50126 and EN 50129, the preliminary studies concerning the interactions between hardware and software shall have been recorded in the Sys- tem Safety Requirements Specification.

clause_title: If previously developed software is to be used
requirement_text: as part of the design then it shall be clearly identified and documented.
action: as part of the design then it shall be clearly identified and documented.

clause_title: If previously developed software is to be used
requirement_text: The Software Archi- tecture Specification shall justify the software’s suitability in satisfying the Software Require- ments Specification and the software safety in- tegrity level.
action: The Software Archi- tecture Specification shall justify the software’s suitability in satisfying the Software Require- ments Specification and the software safety in- tegrity level.

clause_title: If previously developed software is to be used
requirement_text: The effects of any changes to the software on the rest of the system must be care- fully considered in order to decide whether Se il software sviluppato in precedenza viene uti- lizzato come parte del progetto allora esso deve essere chiaramente identificato e documentato.
action: The effects of any changes to the software on the rest of the system must be care- fully considered in order to decide whether Se il software sviluppato in precedenza viene uti- lizzato come parte del progetto allora esso deve essere chiaramente identificato e documentato.

clause_title: If previously developed software is to be used
requirement_text: There shall be evidence that interface specifica- tions to other modules which are not being re-verified, re-validated and re-assessed are be- ing followed.
action: There shall be evidence that interface specifica- tions to other modules which are not being re-verified, re-validated and re-assessed are be- ing followed.

clause_title: If previously developed software is to be used
requirement_text: Whenever possible existing verified software modules developed according to this standard shall be used in the design.
action: Whenever possible existing verified software modules developed according to this standard shall be used in the design.

clause_title: If previously developed software is to be used
requirement_text: The Software Architecture shall minimise the safety part of the application.
action: The Software Architecture shall minimise the safety part of the application.

clause_title: If previously developed software is to be used
requirement_text: Where the software consists of components of different software safety integrity levels then all of the software components shall be treated as belonging to the highest software safety integri- ty level unless there is evidence of independ- ence between the higher software safety integri- ty level components and the lower software safety integrity level components.
condition: Where the software consists of components of different software safety integrity levels then all of the software components
action: shall be treated as belonging to the highest software safety integri- ty level unless there is evidence of independ- ence between the higher software safety integri- ty level components and the lower software safety integrity level components.

clause_title: If previously developed software is to be used
requirement_text: This evidence shall be recorded in the Software Architecture Specification.
action: This evidence shall be recorded in the Software Architecture Specification.

clause_title: If previously developed software is to be used
requirement_text: The Software Architecture Specification shall identify the strategy for the software develop- ment to the extent required by the software safety integrity level.
action: The Software Architecture Specification shall identify the strategy for the software develop- ment to the extent required by the software safety integrity level.

clause_title: If previously developed software is to be used
requirement_text: The Software Architecture Specification shall be expressed and structured in such a way that it is: i) complete, clear, precise, unequivocal, verifi- able, testable, maintainable and feasible, ii) traceable back to the Software Require- ments Specification.
action: The Software Architecture Specification shall be expressed and structured in such a way that it is: i) complete, clear, precise, unequivocal, verifi- able, testable, maintainable and feasible, ii) traceable back to the Software Require- ments Specification.

clause_title: If previously developed software is to be used
requirement_text: The Software Architecture Specification shall justify the balance taken between the strategies of avoiding faults and handling faults.
action: The Software Architecture Specification shall justify the balance taken between the strategies of avoiding faults and handling faults.

clause_title: If previously developed software is to be used
requirement_text: The Software Architecture Specification shall justify that the techniques and measures chosen form a set which satisfies the Software Require- ments Specification at the required software safety integrity level.
action: The Software Architecture Specification shall justify that the techniques and measures chosen form a set which satisfies the Software Require- ments Specification at the required software safety integrity level.

clause_title: The Software Requirements Speciﬁcation and
requirement_text: the Software Architecture Specification shall be available, although not necessarily finalised, pri- or to the start of the design process.
action: the Software Architecture Specification shall be available, although not necessarily finalised, pri- or to the start of the design process.

clause_title: The Software Requirements Speciﬁcation and
requirement_text: The size and complexity of the software devel- oped shall be kept to a minimum.
action: The size and complexity of the software devel- oped shall be kept to a minimum.

clause_title: The Software Requirements Speciﬁcation and
requirement_text: The Software Design Specification shall de- scribe the software design based on a decom- position into modules with each module having a Software Module Design Specification and a Software Module Test Specification.
action: The Software Design Specification shall de- scribe the software design based on a decom- position into modules with each module having a Software Module Design Specification and a Software Module Test Specification.

clause_title: The Software Module Design Speciﬁcations
requirement_text: Each Software Module design Specification should be self consistent and allow coding of the corresponding module.
action: Each Software Module design Specification should be self consistent and allow coding of the corresponding module.

clause_title: The Software Module Design Speciﬁcations
requirement_text: Each software module shall be readable, under- standable and testable.
action: Each software module shall be readable, under- standable and testable.

clause_title: The Software Module Design Speciﬁcations
requirement_text: A suitable set of tools, including design meth- ods, languages and compilers shall be selected for the required software safety integrity level over the whole lifecycle of the software.
action: A suitable set of tools, including design meth- ods, languages and compilers shall be selected for the required software safety integrity level over the whole lifecycle of the software.

clause_title: The Software Module Design Speciﬁcations
requirement_text: When applicable, automatic testing tools and integrated development tools shall be used.
action: automatic testing tools and integrated development tools shall be used.

clause_title: The Software Module Design Speciﬁcations
requirement_text: This shall take account of the needs of the Veri- fier and Validator.
action: This shall take account of the needs of the Veri- fier and Validator.

clause_title: The Software Module Design Speciﬁcations
requirement_text: To the extent required by the software safety in- tegrity level, the programming language select- ed shall have a translator/compiler which has one of the following: i) a “Certificate of Validation” to a recognised National/International standard; ii) an assessment report which details its fit- Nella misura in cui è richiesto dal livello di integrità della sicurezza del software, il linguaggio di pro- grammazione scelto deve avere un traduttore/com- pilatore che possiede una tra le cose seguenti: i) un “Certificato di Validazione” basato su una norma Nazionale/Internazionale riconosciuta; ii) un rapporto di valutazione che specifichi che ness for purpose; è adatto allo scopo; iii) a redundant signature control based process that provides detection of the translation er- rors.
action: To the extent required by the software safety in- tegrity level, the programming language select- ed shall have a translator/compiler which has one of the following: i) a “Certificate of Validation” to a recognised National/International standard; ii) an assessment report which details its fit- Nella misura in cui è richiesto dal livello di integrità della sicurezza del software, il linguaggio di pro- grammazione scelto deve avere un traduttore/com- pilatore che possiede una tra le cose seguenti: i) un “Certificato di Validazione” basato su una norma Nazionale/Internazionale riconosciuta; ii) un rapporto di valutazione che specifichi che ness for purpose; è adatto allo scopo; iii) a redundant signature control based process that provides detection of the translation er- rors.

clause_title: The Software Module Design Speciﬁcations
requirement_text: The language chosen shall meet the following requirements: i) the language chosen shall contain features that facilitate the identification of program- ming errors; the language chosen shall support features that match the design method.
action: The language chosen shall meet the following requirements: i) the language chosen shall contain features that facilitate the identification of program- ming errors; the language chosen shall support features that match the design method.

clause_title: The Software Module Design Speciﬁcations
requirement_text: ii) When 10.4.10 cannot be satisfied then a justifica- tion for any alternative language detailing its fit- ness for purpose shall be recorded in the Soft- ware Architecture Specification or Software Quality Assurance Plan.
action: ii) When 10.4.10 cannot be satisfied then a justifica- tion for any alternative language detailing its fit- ness for purpose shall be recorded in the Soft- ware Architecture Specification or Software Quality Assurance Plan.

clause_title: The Software Module Design Speciﬁcations
requirement_text: Coding standards shall be developed and used for the development of all software.
action: Coding standards shall be developed and used for the development of all software.

clause_title: The Software Module Design Speciﬁcations
requirement_text: These shall be referenced in the Software Quality Assurance Plan (see 15.4.5).
action: These shall be referenced in the Software Quality Assurance Plan (see 15.4.5).

clause_title: The coding standards shall specify good pro-
requirement_text: As a minimum, each soft- ware module shall contain in the source code the following (non-exhaustive) list: information defined the in author; configuration history; short description.
action: As a minimum, each soft- ware module shall contain in the source code the following (non-exhaustive) list: information defined the in author; configuration history; short description.

clause_title: The coding standards shall specify good pro-
requirement_text: It should be the same for all the modules.
action: It should be the same for all the modules.

clause_title: The coding standards shall specify good pro-
requirement_text: Software Module Testing: Each module shall have a Software Module Test Specification which the module shall be tested against.
action: Software Module Testing: Each module shall have a Software Module Test Specification which the module shall be tested against.

clause_title: The coding standards shall specify good pro-
requirement_text: These tests shall show that each module performs its intended function.
action: These tests shall show that each module performs its intended function.

clause_title: The coding standards shall specify good pro-
requirement_text: The Software Module Test Specification shall define the required degree of test coverage.
action: The Software Module Test Specification shall define the required degree of test coverage.

clause_title: The coding standards shall specify good pro-
requirement_text: A Software Module Test Report shall be pro- duced and shall include the following features: i) a statement of the test results and whether each module has met the requirements of its Software Module Design Specification; ii) a statement of test coverage shall be provid- ed for each module, showing that all source code instructions have been executed at least once; iii) it shall be in a form that is auditable; Prove del Modulo Software: Ogni modulo deve ave- re una Specifica di Prova del Modulo Software con la quale deve essere provato il modulo.
action: A Software Module Test Report shall be pro- duced and shall include the following features: i) a statement of the test results and whether each module has met the requirements of its Software Module Design Specification; ii) a statement of test coverage shall be provid- ed for each module, showing that all source code instructions have been executed at least once; iii) it shall be in a form that is auditable; Prove del Modulo Software: Ogni modulo deve ave- re una Specifica di Prova del Modulo Software con la quale deve essere provato il modulo.

clause_title: The coding standards shall specify good pro-
requirement_text: Deve essere prodotto un Rapporto di Prova del Modulo Software e deve comprendere i seguenti aspetti: i) una dichiarazione dei risultati della prova e se ogni modulo ha soddisfatto i requisiti della sua Specifica di Progettazione del Modulo Software; ii) per ogni modulo deve essere fornita una di- chiarazione di copertura della prova, dimo- strando che tutte le istruzioni di codice sor- gente sono state eseguite almeno una volta; iii) deve essere in un formato tale da consentire la verifica ispettiva; iv) test cases and their results shall be recorded in a machine readable form for subsequent analysis; Tests should be repeatable and be performed by automatic means, if practica- ble.
action: Deve essere prodotto un Rapporto di Prova del Modulo Software e deve comprendere i seguenti aspetti: i) una dichiarazione dei risultati della prova e se ogni modulo ha soddisfatto i requisiti della sua Specifica di Progettazione del Modulo Software; ii) per ogni modulo deve essere fornita una di- chiarazione di copertura della prova, dimo- strando che tutte le istruzioni di codice sor- gente sono state eseguite almeno una volta; iii) deve essere in un formato tale da consentire la verifica ispettiva; iv) test cases and their results shall be recorded in a machine readable form for subsequent analysis; Tests should be repeatable and be performed by automatic means, if practica- ble.

clause_title: A Software Veriﬁcation Plan shall be created in
requirement_text: The Software Verification Plan shall document all the criteria, techniques and tools to be uti- lised in the verification process for that phase.
action: The Software Verification Plan shall document all the criteria, techniques and tools to be uti- lised in the verification process for that phase.

clause_title: A Software Veriﬁcation Plan shall be created in
requirement_text: The Software Verification Plan shall describe the activities to be performed to ensure correctness and consistency with respect to the products and standards provided as input to that phase.
action: The Software Verification Plan shall describe the activities to be performed to ensure correctness and consistency with respect to the products and standards provided as input to that phase.

clause_title: A Software Veriﬁcation Plan shall be created in
requirement_text: The Software Verification Plan shall address the following: i) the selection of verification strategies and techniques.
action: The Software Verification Plan shall address the following: i) the selection of verification strategies and techniques.

clause_title: A Software Veriﬁcation Plan shall be created in
requirement_text: To avoid undue complexity in the assessment of the verification and test activity, preference should be given to the selection of test cases and methods etc., which are in themselves readily analysable; the selection and utilisation of the software test equipment; ii) Il Piano di Verifica del Software deve trattare quan- to segue: i) la scelta delle strategie e delle tecniche di verifi- ca.
action: To avoid undue complexity in the assessment of the verification and test activity, preference should be given to the selection of test cases and methods etc., which are in themselves readily analysable; the selection and utilisation of the software test equipment; ii) Il Piano di Verifica del Software deve trattare quan- to segue: i) la scelta delle strategie e delle tecniche di verifi- ca.

clause_title: Veriﬁcation shall be carried out by an independ-
requirement_text: Testing which is not fully documented and is performed by the designer prior to verification shall not be regarded as part of the verification.
action: Testing which is not fully documented and is performed by the designer prior to verification shall not be regarded as part of the verification.

clause_title: Veriﬁcation shall be carried out by an independ-
requirement_text: The results of each verification shall be retained in a form defined or referenced in the Software Verification Plan such that it is auditable.
action: The results of each verification shall be retained in a form defined or referenced in the Software Verification Plan such that it is auditable.

clause_title: Veriﬁcation shall be carried out by an independ-
requirement_text: After each verification activity a verification report shall be produced stating either that the software has passed the verification or the reasons for the failures.
action: After each verification activity a verification report shall be produced stating either that the software has passed the verification or the reasons for the failures.

clause_title: Veriﬁcation shall be carried out by an independ-
requirement_text: The verification reports shall address the following: i) items which do not conform to the Software Requirements Specification, Software De- sign Specification or Software Module De- sign Specifications; items which do not conform to the Software Quality Assurance Plan; ii) I risultati di ogni verifica devono essere conservati in un formato definito o referenziati nel Piano di Verifica del Software in modo da poter essere sot- toposti a verifica ispettiva.
action: The verification reports shall address the following: i) items which do not conform to the Software Requirements Specification, Software De- sign Specification or Software Module De- sign Specifications; items which do not conform to the Software Quality Assurance Plan; ii) I risultati di ogni verifica devono essere conservati in un formato definito o referenziati nel Piano di Verifica del Software in modo da poter essere sot- toposti a verifica ispettiva.

clause_title: Veriﬁcation shall be carried out by an independ-
requirement_text: The results shall be recorded in a Software Re- quirements Verification Report.
action: The results shall be recorded in a Software Re- quirements Verification Report.

clause_title: CODICE
requirement_text: The results shall be recorded in a Software Ar- chitecture and Design Verification Report.
action: The results shall be recorded in a Software Ar- chitecture and Design Verification Report.

clause_title: CODICE
requirement_text: The results shall be recorded in a Software Module Verification Report.
action: The results shall be recorded in a Software Module Verification Report.

clause_title: CODICE
requirement_text: Software Source Code Verification: To the extent demanded by the software safety integrity level the Software Source Code shall be verified to ensure conformance to the Software Module Design Specification and the Software Quality Assurance Plan.
action: Software Source Code Verification: To the extent demanded by the software safety integrity level the Software Source Code shall be verified to ensure conformance to the Software Module Design Specification and the Software Quality Assurance Plan.

clause_title: CODICE
requirement_text: This shall include a check to determine whether the coding standards have been applied correctly.
action: This shall include a check to determine whether the coding standards have been applied correctly.

clause_title: CODICE
requirement_text: The results shall be recorded in a Software Source Code Verification Report.
action: The results shall be recorded in a Software Source Code Verification Report.

clause_title: CODICE
requirement_text: A Software Integration Test Report shall be pro- duced as follows: i) a Software Integration Test Report shall be produced stating the test results and wheth- er the objectives and criteria of the Software Integration Test Plan have been met.
action: A Software Integration Test Report shall be pro- duced as follows: i) a Software Integration Test Report shall be produced stating the test results and wheth- er the objectives and criteria of the Software Integration Test Plan have been met.

clause_title: CODICE
requirement_text: If there is a failure, the reasons for the failure shall be recorded; Verifica del Codice Sorgente del Software: nella mi- sura in cui è richiesto dal livello di integrità della sicurezza del software il Codice Sorgente del Sof- tware deve essere verificato per assicurare confor- mità alla Specifica di Progettazione del Modulo Software e al Piano di Assicurazione della Qualità del Software.
action: the reasons for the failure shall be recorded; Verifica del Codice Sorgente del Software: nella mi- sura in cui è richiesto dal livello di integrità della sicurezza del software il Codice Sorgente del Sof- tware deve essere verificato per assicurare confor- mità alla Specifica di Progettazione del Modulo Software e al Piano di Assicurazione della Qualità del Software.

clause_title: Sw Validation Report
requirement_text: The Software/Hardware Integration Test Plan shall document the following: test cases and test data; i) ii) types of tests to be performed; iii) test environment including tools, support software and configuration description; and modo idoneo.
action: The Software/Hardware Integration Test Plan shall document the following: test cases and test data; i) ii) types of tests to be performed; iii) test environment including tools, support software and configuration description; and modo idoneo.

clause_title: Sw Validation Report
requirement_text: The Software/Hardware Integration Test Plan shall distinguish between those activities which can be carried out by the developer on his premises and those that require access to the user’s site.
action: The Software/Hardware Integration Test Plan shall distinguish between those activities which can be carried out by the developer on his premises and those that require access to the user’s site.

clause_title: Sw Validation Report
requirement_text: The Software/Hardware Integration Test Plan shall distinguish between the following activities: i) merging of software onto the target hard- ware; system integration; ii) Il Piano di Prova di Integrazione Software/Hard- ware deve fare distinzione tra le seguenti attività: allocazione del software nell’hardware a cui è de- i) stinato; integrazione del sistema; ii) Tools and facilities identified in the Soft- ware/Hardware Integration Test Plan should be available at the earliest practicable time.

clause_title: Sw Validation Report
requirement_text: During Software/Hardware Integration any modification or change to the integrated system shall be subject to an impact study which shall identify all modules impacted and the necessary reverification activities.
action: During Software/Hardware Integration any modification or change to the integrated system shall be subject to an impact study which shall identify all modules impacted and the necessary reverification activities.

clause_title: Sw Validation Report
requirement_text: Durante l’Integrazione Software/Hardware ogni modifica o cambiamento al sistema integrato deve essere soggetto ad uno studio dell’impatto che deve identificare tutti i moduli coinvolti e le ne- cessarie attività di riverifica Test cases and their results shall be recorded, preferably in machine readable form for subse- quent analysis.

clause_title: Analysing and testing shall be the main valida-
requirement_text: A Software Validation Plan shall be established and detailed in suitable documentation.
action: A Software Validation Plan shall be established and detailed in suitable documentation.

clause_title: Analysing and testing shall be the main valida-
requirement_text: The Software Validation Plan shall be devel- oped, performed and results evaluated by an independent party to the extent required by the software safety integrity level.
action: The Software Validation Plan shall be devel- oped, performed and results evaluated by an independent party to the extent required by the software safety integrity level.

clause_title: Analysing and testing shall be the main valida-
requirement_text: If required by the software safety integrity level, the scope and contents of the Software Validation Plan shall be agreed with the assessor.
condition: If required by the software safety integrity level
action: the scope and contents of the Software Validation Plan shall be agreed with the assessor.

clause_title: Analysing and testing shall be the main valida-
requirement_text: This agree- ment shall also make a statement concerning the presence of the assessor during testing.
action: This agree- ment shall also make a statement concerning the presence of the assessor during testing.

clause_title: Analysing and testing shall be the main valida-
requirement_text: The Software Validation Plan shall include a summary justifying the validation strategy cho- sen.
action: The Software Validation Plan shall include a summary justifying the validation strategy cho- sen.

clause_title: Analysing and testing shall be the main valida-
requirement_text: The justification shall include considera- tion, according to the required software safety integrity level, of: i) manual or automated techniques or both; static or dynamic techniques or both; ii) iii) analytical or statistical techniques or both.
action: The justification shall include considera- tion, according to the required software safety integrity level, of: i) manual or automated techniques or both; static or dynamic techniques or both; ii) iii) analytical or statistical techniques or both.

clause_title: (cid:2)
requirement_text: The Software Validation Plan shall identify the steps necessary to demonstrate the adequacy of the: Software Requirements Specification; Software Architecture Specification; Software Design Specification; Software Module Design Specification; Il Piano di Validazione del Software deve identifica- re i passi necessari a dimostrare l’adeguatezza della: Specifica dei Requisiti del Software; Specifica dell’Architettura del Software; Specifica della Progettazione del Software; Specifica della Progettazione del Modulo Sof- tware; in fulfilling the safety requirements set out in the System Safety Requirements Specification.

requirement_text: The Validator shall check that the verification process is complete.
action: The Validator shall check that the verification process is complete.

requirement_text: Measurement equipment used for validation shall be calibrated appropriately.
action: Measurement equipment used for validation shall be calibrated appropriately.

clause_title: (cid:2)
requirement_text: Any tools, hardware or software, used for validation shall be shown to be suitable for the purpose.
action: Any tools, hardware or software, used for validation shall be shown to be suitable for the purpose.

clause_title: (cid:2)
requirement_text: The software shall be exercised by simulation of input signals present during normal opera- tion, anticipated occurrences and undesired conditions requiring system action.
action: The software shall be exercised by simulation of input signals present during normal opera- tion, anticipated occurrences and undesired conditions requiring system action.

clause_title: (cid:2)
requirement_text: The results of the validation shall be document- ed in the Software Validation Report in an audit- able form.

requirement_text: Once hardware/software integration is finished, a Software Validation Report shall be produced as follows: i) it shall state whether the objectives and cri- teria of the Software Validation Plan have been met.

clause_title: For software of safety integrity level zero:
requirement_text: i) the Assessor shall only be required to con- firm that this is the appropriate software safety integrity level; it is also possible to agree this level between the supplier and the user at the time of ten- dering.
action: i) the Assessor shall only be required to con- firm that this is the appropriate software safety integrity level; it is also possible to agree this level between the supplier and the user at the time of ten- dering.

clause_title: For software of safety integrity level zero:
requirement_text: The sec- ond Assessor shall check that the software is of the required software safety integrity level and that it is fit for its intended application on the intended target computer.
action: The sec- ond Assessor shall check that the software is of the required software safety integrity level and that it is fit for its intended application on the intended target computer.

clause_title: For software of safety integrity level zero:
requirement_text: The Assessor shall have access to the design and development process and all project related documentation.
action: The Assessor shall have access to the design and development process and all project related documentation.

clause_title: For software of safety integrity level zero:
requirement_text: The assessment of the software shall be carried out by an Assessor who is independent from the design team.

clause_title: The Assessor shall assess that the software of

clause_title: The Assessor shall assess that the software of
requirement_text: If, in the opinion of the Assessor, the software is fit for its intended application, the final Software Assessment Report shall include a statement as to the software safety integrity level achieved by the software.
action: If, in the opinion of the Assessor, the software is fit for its intended application, the final Software Assessment Report shall include a statement as to the software safety integrity level achieved by the software.

action: A suitable set of techniques shall be chosen according to the software safety integrity level.

clause_title: SOFTWARE MAINTENANCE
requirement_text: A suitable set of techniques shall be chosen according to the software safety integrity level.
action: A suitable set of techniques shall be chosen according to the software safety integrity level.

clause_title: As a minimum, maintenance shall be carried
requirement_text: In addition, the following requirements con- cerning software maintenance shall also be met.
action: In addition, the following requirements con- cerning software maintenance shall also be met.

clause_title: As a minimum, maintenance shall be carried
requirement_text: Maintainability shall be designed into the soft- ware system, in particular, by following the re- quirements of clause 10 of this European Stand- ard.
action: Maintainability shall be designed into the soft- ware system, in particular, by following the re- quirements of clause 10 of this European Stand- ard.

clause_title: As a minimum, maintenance shall be carried
requirement_text: ISO/IEC 9126 should also be employed in order to require and verify a minimum level of maintainability.
action: ISO/IEC 9126 should also be employed in order to require and verify a minimum level of maintainability.

clause_title: As a minimum, maintenance shall be carried
requirement_text: Procedures for the maintenance of software shall be established and recorded in the Soft- ware Maintenance Plan.
action: Procedures for the maintenance of software shall be established and recorded in the Soft- ware Maintenance Plan.

clause_title: As a minimum, maintenance shall be carried
requirement_text: These procedures shall also include: i) control of error reporting, error logs, main- tenance records, change authorisation and software/system configuration; ii) verification, validation and assessment; and iii) definition of the Authority which approves the changed software.
action: These procedures shall also include: i) control of error reporting, error logs, main- tenance records, change authorisation and software/system configuration; ii) verification, validation and assessment; and iii) definition of the Authority which approves the changed software.

clause_title: As a minimum, maintenance shall be carried
requirement_text: The maintenance activities shall be audited against the Software Maintenance Plan, at inter- vals defined in the Software Quality Assurance Plan.
action: The maintenance activities shall be audited against the Software Maintenance Plan, at inter- vals defined in the Software Quality Assurance Plan.

clause_title: As a minimum, maintenance shall be carried
requirement_text: Maintenance shall be performed with the same level of expertise, tools, documentation, plan- ning and management as the initial develop- ment of the system.
action: Maintenance shall be performed with the same level of expertise, tools, documentation, plan- ning and management as the initial develop- ment of the system.

clause_title: As a minimum, maintenance shall be carried
requirement_text: This shall apply also to configuration management, change control, document control, and independence of in- volved parties.
action: This shall apply also to configuration management, change control, document control, and independence of in- volved parties.

clause_title: As a minimum, maintenance shall be carried
requirement_text: For software safety in- tegrity level 3 or 4, the contracting entities shall, before starting work on any change, decide whether the maintenance actions are to be con- sidered as major or minor or whether the exist- ing maintenance methods for the system are ad- equate.
action: For software safety in- tegrity level 3 or 4, the contracting entities shall, before starting work on any change, decide whether the maintenance actions are to be con- sidered as major or minor or whether the exist- ing maintenance methods for the system are ad- equate.

clause_title: As a minimum, maintenance shall be carried
requirement_text: For software safety integrity levels 0, 1 or 2, the same decision shall be taken by the supplier.
action: For software safety integrity levels 0, 1 or 2, the same decision shall be taken by the supplier.

clause_title: External supplier control, problem reporting
requirement_text: and corrective actions shall be managed with the same criteria specified in the relevant para- graphs of the Software Quality Assurance clause.
action: and corrective actions shall be managed with the same criteria specified in the relevant para- graphs of the Software Quality Assurance clause.

clause_title: External supplier control, problem reporting
requirement_text: A Software Maintenance Record shall be estab- lished for each Software Item before its first re- lease, and it shall be maintained.
action: A Software Maintenance Record shall be estab- lished for each Software Item before its first re- lease, and it shall be maintained.

clause_title: External supplier control, problem reporting
requirement_text: In addition to the requirements of EN ISO 9000-3 for “Mainte- nance Records and Reports”, this Record shall also include: i) references to all the Software Change Records for that Software Item; ii) change consequence information; Deve essere stabilito e deve essere mantenuto un registro di Manutenzione del Software per ogni elemento di Software prima della sua prima ver- sione.
action: In addition to the requirements of EN ISO 9000-3 for “Mainte- nance Records and Reports”, this Record shall also include: i) references to all the Software Change Records for that Software Item; ii) change consequence information; Deve essere stabilito e deve essere mantenuto un registro di Manutenzione del Software per ogni elemento di Software prima della sua prima ver- sione.

clause_title: External supplier control, problem reporting
requirement_text: the modification or change request; A Software Change Record shall be established for each maintenance activity.
action: the modification or change request; A Software Change Record shall be established for each maintenance activity.

clause_title: External supplier control, problem reporting
requirement_text: This record shall include: i) ii) an analysis of the impact of the mainte- nance activity on the overall system, includ- ing hardware, software, human interaction and the environment and possible interac- tions; la modifica o la richiesta di modifica; Deve essere stabilito per ogni attività di manuten- zione un registro delle Modifiche del Software.
action: This record shall include: i) ii) an analysis of the impact of the mainte- nance activity on the overall system, includ- ing hardware, software, human interaction and the environment and possible interac- tions; la modifica o la richiesta di modifica; Deve essere stabilito per ogni attività di manuten- zione un registro delle Modifiche del Software.

clause_title: External supplier control, problem reporting
requirement_text: Therefore the Software Validation Plan shall address both problems, according to the software safety integrity level.
action: Therefore the Software Validation Plan shall address both problems, according to the software safety integrity level.

clause_title: External supplier control, problem reporting
requirement_text: The degree of inde- pendence of revalidation shall be the same as that for validation.
action: The degree of inde- pendence of revalidation shall be the same as that for validation.

clause_title: Data Preparation Lifecycle
requirement_text: Application Requirements Specification The requirements for the application shall be defined.
action: Application Requirements Specification The requirements for the application shall be defined.

clause_title: Data Preparation Lifecycle
requirement_text: Overall Installation Design The system architecture shall be defined, and the quantity and type of the generic compo- nents to be used shall be specified.
action: Overall Installation Design The system architecture shall be defined, and the quantity and type of the generic compo- nents to be used shall be specified.

clause_title: Data Preparation Lifecycle
requirement_text: Those com- ponents which contain software shall have been developed in conformance with this Euro- pean Standard.
action: Those com- ponents which contain software shall have been developed in conformance with this Euro- pean Standard.

clause_title: Data Preparation Lifecycle
requirement_text: The functions specified in the requirements shall be allocated to the compo- Progettazione Generale dell’Installazione L’architettura del sistema deve essere definita, e la quantità e il tipo dei componenti generici da usa- re devono essere specificati.
action: The functions specified in the requirements shall be allocated to the compo- Progettazione Generale dell’Installazione L’architettura del sistema deve essere definita, e la quantità e il tipo dei componenti generici da usa- re devono essere specificati.

clause_title: Validation and Assessment
requirement_text: Validation and assessment activities shall audit the performance of each stage of the life-cycle.
action: Validation and assessment activities shall audit the performance of each stage of the life-cycle.

clause_title: Data Preparation Procedures and Tools
requirement_text: For each new type of system configured by ap- plication data, specific data preparation proce- dures and tools shall be developed to allow the data preparation lifecycle specified in 17.4.1 to be applied to installations of the new system.
action: For each new type of system configured by ap- plication data, specific data preparation proce- dures and tools shall be developed to allow the data preparation lifecycle specified in 17.4.1 to be applied to installations of the new system.

clause_title: Data Preparation Procedures and Tools
requirement_text: Development of these procedures and tools shall be carried out in accordance with this Eu- ropean Standard in parallel with the generic software and hardware for the system.
action: Development of these procedures and tools shall be carried out in accordance with this Eu- ropean Standard in parallel with the generic software and hardware for the system.

clause_title: Data Preparation Procedures and Tools
requirement_text: The veri- fication, validation and assessment activities shall ensure that the data preparation tools and the generic software are compatible.
action: The veri- fication, validation and assessment activities shall ensure that the data preparation tools and the generic software are compatible.

clause_title: Data Preparation Procedures and Tools
requirement_text: At the Software Design phase for the system con- figured by application data, a Data Preparation Plan shall be produced to define a documenta- tion structure for the data preparation process.
action: At the Software Design phase for the system con- figured by application data, a Data Preparation Plan shall be produced to define a documenta- tion structure for the data preparation process.

clause_title: Data Preparation Procedures and Tools
requirement_text: These documents shall be related to the data preparation lifecycle model described in 17.4.1.
action: These documents shall be related to the data preparation lifecycle model described in 17.4.1.

clause_title: Data Preparation Procedures and Tools
requirement_text: The plan shall specify the data preparation pro- cedures and tools to be used to meet the re- quired system safety integrity levels.
action: The plan shall specify the data preparation pro- cedures and tools to be used to meet the re- quired system safety integrity levels.

clause_title: Data Preparation Procedures and Tools
requirement_text: The plan shall specify the requirements for the independ- ence between staff carrying out verification, val- idation and design tasks.
action: The plan shall specify the requirements for the independ- ence between staff carrying out verification, val- idation and design tasks.

requirement_text: This safe- ty integrity level shall be derived from the re- Il Piano di Preparazione dei Dati deve assegnare un livello di integrità della sicurezza ad ogni stru- mento, hardware o software, usato nel ciclo di vita di preparazione dei dati.
action: This safe- ty integrity level shall be derived from the re- Il Piano di Preparazione dei Dati deve assegnare un livello di integrità della sicurezza ad ogni stru- mento, hardware o software, usato nel ciclo di vita di preparazione dei dati.

condition: Where new notations are intro- duced

clause_title: quired system safety integrity level and the de-
requirement_text: This in- formation shall be contained in the Data Test Plan and the results shall be recorded in the Data Test Report.
action: This in- formation shall be contained in the Data Test Plan and the results shall be recorded in the Data Test Report.

clause_title: quired system safety integrity level and the de-
requirement_text: All data and associated documentation shall be subject to the configuration management require- ments of section 15 of this standard.
action: All data and associated documentation shall be subject to the configuration management require- ments of section 15 of this standard.

clause_title: quired system safety integrity level and the de-
requirement_text: The configu- ration management records shall list the version of generic software with which the data has been designed to operate, and the versions of the tools used in the data preparation process.
action: The configu- ration management records shall list the version of generic software with which the data has been designed to operate, and the versions of the tools used in the data preparation process.

clause_title: quired system safety integrity level and the de-
requirement_text: Software Development Development of the generic software to be used in a system configured by application data shall comply with the requirements in clauses 1 to 16 of this standard.
action: Software Development Development of the generic software to be used in a system configured by application data shall comply with the requirements in clauses 1 to 16 of this standard.

clause_title: quired system safety integrity level and the de-
requirement_text: The following additional requirements shall also be observed.
action: The following additional requirements shall also be observed.

clause_title: quired system safety integrity level and the de-
requirement_text: During the Software Requirements Specification phase, those functions which make use of appli- cation data in each system and subsystem shall be identified.
action: During the Software Requirements Specification phase, those functions which make use of appli- cation data in each system and subsystem shall be identified.

clause_title: quired system safety integrity level and the de-
requirement_text: During the Software Design phase the detailed in- terfaces between the generic software and appli- cation data shall be specified, unless this has al- ready been specified at an earlier phase of the lifecycle, for example as a result of a require- ment to use an existing application specific lan- guage.
action: During the Software Design phase the detailed in- terfaces between the generic software and appli- cation data shall be specified, unless this has al- ready been specified at an earlier phase of the lifecycle, for example as a result of a require- ment to use an existing application specific lan- guage.

requirement_text: Like- wise, application specific data should be separated from other data.
action: Like- wise, application specific data should be separated from other data.

clause_title: During the Software Maintenance phase, the
requirement_text: change control procedures must ensure that any amendment to the generic software may only be installed after it has been established that either the revised software is compatible with the original data, or the data has been revised as necessary.
action: change control procedures must ensure that any amendment to the generic software may only be installed after it has been established that either the revised software is compatible with the original data, or the data has been revised as necessary.
